ch_001:
title: Pass-the-Hash Detection
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 4624
        LogonType:
            - 3
            - 9
        AuthenticationPackageName: NTLM
    condition: selection
level: high
ch_002:
title: Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 4698
        TaskContent|contains:
            - '-enc'
            - '-EncodedCommand'
            - 'mshta.exe'
            - 'rundll32.exe'
            - 'javascript:'
    condition: selection
level: high
ch_003:
title: LSASS Access - Credential Dumping
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: sysmon
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 10
        TargetImage|endswith: '\\lsass.exe'
        GrantedAccess: '0x1010'
    condition: selection
level: critical
ch_004:
title: Encoded PowerShell Command
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: sysmon
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 1
        Image|endswith: '\\powershell.exe'
        CommandLine|contains:
            - '-enc'
            - '-EncodedCommand'
            - '-e '
    condition: selection
level: high
ch_005:
title: SQL Injection Attempt
status: experimental
logsource:
    category: webserver
detection:
    selection:
        URI|contains:
            - 'UNION SELECT'
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "' OR '1'='1"
            - '--'
    condition: selection
level: high
